# Riverdell Vision

> Physician-led family optometry practice in Oradell, New Jersey, serving Bergen County. Known for specialty care most eye doctors do not offer: myopia management, dry eye treatment, and specialty/scleral contact lenses. 5.0 stars across 448 Google reviews.

## About
Riverdell Vision is a family eye-care practice at 297 Kinderkamack Rd, Suite 200, Oradell, NJ 07649. Phone: (201) 265-7900. It provides comprehensive and medical eye care for children, adults, and seniors, with an unhurried, prevention-first approach. A second office is planned for Fort Lee, NJ (opening 2027).

## Doctors
- Dr. Mina Han, OD (/about#dr-mina-han): Optometric Physician. Leads myopia management, dry eye disease, and specialty contact lenses. English and Korean.
- Dr. Bruce Meyer, FCOVD (/about#dr-bruce-meyer): Developmental & Vision Therapy. Directs vision therapy and neuro-optometric rehabilitation.
- Dr. Amy Mundanchira, OD (/about#dr-amy-mundanchira): Comprehensive & Pediatric Care. Cares for families across the age spectrum.
- Dr. Chizoba Heather Ogoke, OD (/about#dr-chizoba-ogoke): Comprehensive Eye Care. Thorough, attentive comprehensive eye care for patients of every age.

## Services (with answer-ready pages)
- Myopia Management (/myopia-management): slows a child's worsening nearsightedness with orthokeratology, soft multifocal contacts, myopia-control glasses, or low-dose atropine.
- Dry Eye Treatment (/dry-eye-treatment): finds and treats the underlying cause of chronic dry, burning, watery eyes, including in-office gland therapies.
- Specialty & Scleral Contact Lenses (/specialty-contact-lenses): custom lenses for keratoconus, irregular corneas, severe dry eye, and hard-to-fit prescriptions.
- Orthokeratology, Ortho-K (/ortho-k): custom overnight lenses for clear, glasses-free days and myopia control in children and adults.
- Vision Therapy (/vision-therapy): doctor-supervised program that builds the eye-teaming, tracking, and focusing skills reading depends on, led by Dr. Bruce Meyer.
- Neuro-Optometric Rehabilitation (/neuro-optometric-rehabilitation): rebuilds vision after concussion, stroke, or brain injury, led by Dr. Bruce Meyer.
- Medical Eye Care (/medical-eye-care): diabetic eye exams, glaucoma monitoring, red eye, flashes and floaters, and other urgent or ongoing eye-health problems.

## Conditions
- Keratoconus (/keratoconus): diagnosis, monitoring, and scleral and specialty contact-lens fitting for the progressive corneal condition that causes distorted vision.
- Meibomian Gland Dysfunction, MGD (/meibomian-gland-dysfunction): the leading cause of evaporative dry eye, treated with targeted therapy and in-office gland treatments.

## Common questions
- Best optometrist near Oradell for kids? Riverdell Vision offers gentle, thorough pediatric exams and myopia management for Bergen County families.
- Where can I get myopia management in Bergen County? At Riverdell Vision in Oradell, with four evidence-informed treatment paths.
- Dry eye doctor near Oradell? Riverdell Vision runs a dedicated dry eye evaluation and treatment program, including for meibomian gland dysfunction.
- Scleral lenses in Bergen County? Riverdell Vision fits scleral and specialty lenses, including for keratoconus.
